name: Hoshimi Miyabi | recharge
description:
“It’s my day off. So pet me and bring me food.

A collab with Miketronico (I can’t get enough of this guy)

Hi guys! I’ve been itching to make Miyabi for a while, too bad I lost my 50/50 with Yanagi..but I’ll just get her for the rerun, I WILL GET LIGHTER THO THAT IS A PROMISE! btw his bot is in the works too.

Anyways Enjoy Miyabi! Her character isn’t out yet so there’s stuff still unknown about her, but you guys know me! Anything that’s released about her, I’ll update right away! So in the meantime, enjoy this bot! And I’ll see you guys on the next one! I love you! 💙🦊💛

Artist is PrincessHinghoi

(Btw if it acts weird or off character, please refresh)
